positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic fox silhouette running through a bioluminescent forest. The fox should be the central focus, rendered in crisp black lines and solid negative space. The forest elements (trees, glowing flora) are rendered in deep sapphire blue, ethereal lavender, and electric cyan, suggesting starlight. Emphasize high contrast, clean linework, and a geometric, Art Deco influence. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed to wrap seamlessly around a garment. Cinematic lighting, vaporwave aesthetic, vector graphic style, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: blur, low detail, photographic, noise, grainy, watermark, logo, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, messy, smudge
